title: Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple
tagline: Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thirunandikkara Cave Temple, also referred to as Thirunanthikarai rock-cut Shiva temple, is a 9th-century rock-cut Hindu cave temple in Kanyakumari district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Thirunandikkara Cave Temple, also referred to as Thirunanthikarai rock-cut Shiva temple, is a 9th-century rock-cut Hindu cave temple in Kanyakumari district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Shiva, with murals and inscriptions. It is attributed to the Ay king Vikramaditya Varaguna by Archaeological Survey of India, but to Pandya rulers (Nedunjadaiyan) a few decades earlier by Ajit Kumar, an archaeologist. It is part of a larger active temple complex named the Thirunanthikarai Shri Nandeeswara temple, Thirunanthikarai and is carved out of the side of a rocky hillock to the north of the tem

topPlaces.name: Kulasekaram
topPlaces.description: Kulasekharam is a town located in the district of Kanyakumari, Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the most important business centres in the district, after Marthandam.

topPlaces.name: Thirparappu
topPlaces.description: Thirparappu is a town located in the Kanyakumari District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a popular tourist destination.

topPlaces.name: Tirparappu Waterfalls
topPlaces.description: Thirparappu Waterfalls is located near Kulasekharam town in Kanyakumari district, Tamil Nadu state, India. The Kodayar River makes its descent at Thirparappu.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvarambu
topPlaces.description: Thiruvarambu is a village in the town of Thiruvattar town panchyat, Tamil Nadu. The Thirparappu Falls is 3 km from Thiruvarambu.

topPlaces.name: Ponmanai
topPlaces.description: Ponmanai is a panchayat town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Snehalatha arts club, one of the oldest of club in Kanyakumari ( started in 1975 ) named after Actress Snehalatha reddy is still doing many social services.

topPlaces.name: Kadayal
topPlaces.description: Kadayal is a town in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Arumanai
topPlaces.description: Arumanai or Arumana is a Panchayat town in Kanyakumari district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. In olden days it is known as Arumana.

topPlaces.name: Vaikunda Chella Pathi
topPlaces.description: Vaikunda Chella Pathi is one among the oldest Nizhal Thangals in the Western Kanyakumari district. It was located 6 km North-east of Marthandam midway between Marthandam and Kulasekaram at Thiruvattar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (39 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirunadhikkara Cave Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kulasekaram, Thirparappu, Tirparappu Waterfalls, Thiruvarambu, Ponmanai.
